---
title: "{title}"
subtitle: "AI Trends Explorer | {report_type} Report"
author: "AI Trends Explorer"
date: "{date}"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    embed-resources: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-fold: true
---

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/e/ed/Esade_logo_nuevo.png){{fig-align="center" width="200"}}

::: {{.callout-note}}
**Report Period:** {period_start} to {period_end} | **Quality Score:** {quality_score}/10 | **Revisions:** {revision_count} | **Items Analyzed:** {items_analyzed}
:::

---

{content}

---

::: {{.callout-tip}}
## About This Report

This report was automatically generated by the **AI Trends Explorer** multi-agent system:

- **Synthesis Agent** (Claude Sonnet) wrote the initial draft
- **Critic Agent** (Groq Llama 3.3 70B) reviewed for grounding, coherence, completeness, and actionability
- Reports scoring below 7/10 are automatically revised (max 2 iterations)

*ESADE Business School — Prototyping Products with AI (PDAI) — Pedro Resende*
:::
